desc: A captivating documentary exploring the daily lives of lions, showcasing their social bonds, hunting strategies, and survival challenges within the wild African savannah.

title: The Americas
desc: On the Atlantic Coast, wild horses clash, eagles hunt ospreys, and sharks guard fish. Raccoons adapt to cities, bears forage in ancient forests, and a 130-year-old oak readies for winter.

desc: The Victoria gang faces the challenge of feeding many new mouths, while another troop wrestles with whether to accept outcasts from the edge of town into their group.
